attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-01-00247 — SEQ is provisional (derived from source CDV-047); maintainer / ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-CARD-01 bucket.
Specialty assigned CARD (cardiovascular syncope); reviewer may prefer EMG (undifferentiated transient loss of consciousness).

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person clinician who measured vitals, performed neurological and cardiovascular examination, orthostatic vitals and inferred a tilt-table result. These clinician-only findings are sealed in 10/11 (telehealth_limits + physical_sign/investigation_result); the presentation layer was de-anchored to what the patient/spouse would report before the diagnosis was known.

Baseline tier set to T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment), NOT reassure-at-home and NOT 000 — a first transient loss of consciousness with a fall cannot have cardiac syncope, seizure or occult head injury excluded remotely, so same-day in-person assessment with an ECG is the honest telehealth disposition even though the final diagnosis is benign.
Age 24 taken directly from the note; sex not stated in the source and inferred male — please confirm on clinician review.
SNOMED/ICD-10-AM candidate codes are best-effort and UNVERIFIED; several (e.g. 398665005 vasovagal syncope, 271594007, 28651003, 82271004) require terminology-server confirmation.

No medication dose synthesised — first-line management of an uncomplicated first reflex faint is non-pharmacological; named drugs are encoded only as not_indicated_here / should_NOT_recommend to capture errors of commission.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
